---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] <one-line summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Description

<!-- Describe the feature in one or two sentences. -->

## 🎯 Which Stage Does It Affect?

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Stage 1 — Scraping (`youm7_scraper.py`)
- [ ] Stage 2 — Preprocessing (`preprocess.py`)
- [ ] Stage 3 — Embedding / FAISS (`embed.py`)
- [ ] Stage 4 — Answer generation (`answer.py`)
- [ ] Stage 5 — API (`api.py`)
- [ ] Frontend (`index.html`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / DevOps
- [ ] New stage entirely

## 🛠️ Implementation Idea

<!-- How would you implement this? Pseudocode, library suggestions,
     references to other projects that do something similar. -->

## 📈 Why It Would Improve the System

<!-- Concrete benefit — accuracy, speed, coverage, usability,
     deployment, etc. Quantify if you can ("would let us scale
     to 10× more articles", "would cut response time by 50%"). -->

## 🌍 Use Case

<!-- A real situation where this feature would matter.
     Who is the user? What are they trying to do? -->

## 🚧 Possible Drawbacks

<!-- Honest assessment — would it slow things down? Add a heavy
     dependency? Break backwards compatibility? -->

## 📚 References / Prior Art (optional)

<!-- Papers, blog posts, libraries, similar features in other projects. -->
